title: Opal Rinse Aid 500ml - Pack of 6
features: Better drying performance when using Dishwasher tablets
Quick dry formula speeds up dish drying process making dishes immediately available to use
Opal rinse aid has 5 power actions and a glass protection ingredient for shinier and drier dishes
Rinses residue, fights water spots whilst providing film and glass protection
description: Bottle with dispenser pourer and secure fitting cap to prevent waste and leakage. Leaves glasses streak free. Rinse-aid - to ensure the rinsing water slides off dishes and glasses and leaves them sparkling with no streak marks. What is Rinse Aid: Rinse Aid is added to a special compartment in the machine and a very small amount is released during the final hot rinse cycle, to reduce the formation of water droplets on crockery etc and so ensures that the water dries away properly and evenly to avoid leaving smears.
